description: Style NoteGive your wardrobe a colourful spin with this sleek and stylish wallet from lino perros. With its multiple slots and pockets, this wallet is the best way to keep your monetary essentials organised in style. Product DetailsGreen wallet with pink and green stitch detailing around the circumferenceSmooth surfaceTwo main compartmentsOne red and three green card slots on left with slip pocketCentre flap with one red and three green card slots, a mesh id card slot and a slip pocketOne red and three green card slots on right with slip pocketMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSize12 cm x 9 cm
